title: Neuroloma articum

The family Apiaceae, also known as the carrot or parsley family, includes a wide range of plant species. Neuroloma articum's classification is closely related to other Apiaceae species, sharing similar characteristics and growth habits. The classification of Neuroloma articum is subject to ongoing research and possible revisions.
